info.title: Auth Service API
info.description: Authentication, session, MFA, password, and service-to-service token endpoints.

post.description: Always returns 202 regardless of whether the email is already registered, to prevent enumeration. If called with a valid service-to-service access token, the user is associated with that service and verification/password emails will use the service's configured From address and subject.

post.summary: Log in with email and password
post.description: Returns either an access/refresh token pair, or an MFA challenge if a TOTP factor is enrolled.

post.summary: Rotate refresh token, get a new access/refresh pair
Reset password using a reset token
Begin TOTP enrollment (returns secret + otpauth URI)
Confirm TOTP enrollment with first code

get.summary: List active sessions for current user
Get full user detail (sessions, MFA factors, status)

patch.description: Setting status=DISABLED also revokes every active session for the user. An admin cannot drop their own admin role — another admin must do it.

post.summary: Revoke every active session for a user (force re-auth)

get.summary: Get a user's audit-log events (most recent first)
